scripts.build: npm run build -w @rift-vs/rift && npm run build -w @rift-vs/rift-embedded
scripts.test: npm run test -w @rift-vs/rift && npm run test -w @rift-vs/rift-embedded
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w @rift-vs/rift && npm run test -w @rift-vs/rift-embedded
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @rift-vs/rift && npm run lint -w @rift-vs/rift-embedded
